The '''''Silver''-class light starship''' was produced by [[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]]. [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] originally used the type-seven engines from this ship to power its seed-ships, before it left known space and had to improvise.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1stm|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
